articleContent:
Dear Rover,
To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon be conducting the update maintenance for Version 3.3: Reverbs From the End of Galaxies.
During the maintenance, you will be unable to log in to the game, so please plan your time accordingly. Additionally, due to the large size of the update, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
 
[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]
✦Maintenance Time: 2026-04-30 04:00 - 2026-04-30 11:00 (UTC+8)
✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2
✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-04-30 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.
※In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.
 
[How to Update]
Once the maintenance for the version update begins, you can follow the following instructions to update your client.
✦PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and then click on "Update."
✦Android: Launch the game and follow the instructions in the update pop-up window to complete the update.
✦iOS: Download/update the game in the App Store.
✦Mac: Download/update the game in the App Store.
✦PS5™: Open the home screen > Select Wuthering Waves > Press the OPTIONS button to Check for Update
 
[Pre-download]
✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-04-28 10:00 (UTC+8)
 
[Required Pre-download Storage]
✦PC: 42 GB
✦Android: 30 GB
✦iOS: 30 GB
※Please note that pre-download may not be possible if your device does not have enough spare storage space.
※A certain amount of storage space is required for the resources merging process during the update maintenance (PC: 13 GB | Android/iOS: 11 GB). Therefore, the actual size of the pre-downloaded resources is 29 GB on PC, 19 GB on Android, and 19 GB on iOS, respectively. After the update maintenance is complete, the extra space used for the resources merging process will be automatically freed up.
 
[How to Pre-download]
✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.
✦Android/iOS: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, press the "Pre-download" button, either on the title screen after a successful login or on the in-game Terminal page, and confirm to pre-download the resources.
 
※You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.
※Please ensure that you have a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.
 
--------------------------------------------------------------------
 
[Version 3.3 Preview]
[New Resonators]
5-Star Resonator: Hiyuki (Glacio/Sword)
※Obtainable through the [Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] Featured Resonator Convene.
 
5-Star Resonator: Denia (Fusion/Rectifier)
※Obtainable through the [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene.
 
[New Weapons]
5-Star Weapon: Frostburn (Sword)
※Obtainable through the [Frostburn] Featured Weapon Convene.
 
5-Star Weapon: Forged Dwarf Star (Rectifier)
※Obtainable through the [Forged Dwarf Star] Featured Weapon Convene.
 
[New Area]
Dimmr Plains
Area includes: Solisia Landing, Sealed Fissure, Silent Crag, Dimmr Deep
※Reach the location during Main Quest Chapter III Act V "Starlights from Yesterdays."
 
[Utility: Expedition Motorbike]
Added Aerial mode, allowing the motorbike to glide across distances.
Added the "Aerial Tactics" Expansion Module.
Adjusted the handling of Bounce Jump.
Refined Cinematic Mode, with more dynamic camera moves.
Enhanced the expedition motorbike's lighting effects.
 
[New Echoes]
Voidwing Moth and two new COST 4 Echoes
 
New Sonata Effects: Reel of Spliced Memories (5pcs), Wishes of Quiet Snowfall (5pcs)
New Tacet Field: Solisia Landing Tacet Field
 
[New Stories]
Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Wishes in the Bell
Main Quest Chapter III Act V: Starlights from Yesterdays
Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky
 
[Gameplay Optimizations]
Added an icon for viewing and switching a Resonator's "Resonance Mode" within some of the game interfaces.
Added Convene animations for some weapons in the "Absolute Pulsation" Weapon Convene
Optimized the UI of certain pages.
 
[Other Optimizations]
Introduced self-developed mobile frame generation, designed to enhance in-game performance of mid-range mobile devices.
Added the "Anisotropic Filtering" graphics option On PC.
Added the "DLAA" graphics option On PC.
 
Optimized the Resource Download Options and Resource Cleanup features on mobile.
- The Resource Cleanup feature will now allow you to remove certain map environment resources.
- reduced the size of the minimum resources (Basic Resources) on mobile.
 
[New Cosmetics]
New Outfit: Plush Dream (Mornye - Deluxe Outfit)
 
Added an Outfit Accessory system, allowing you to equip specific Resonators with accessories.
Accessories: Aemeath - Snowfluff Seal, Hiyuki - Stillmind, Denia - Denia's Doll
 
[Other New Content]
New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Sigillum
New Phantom Echoes: Phantom - Reactor Husk, Phantom - Reminiscence Kronaclaw
New Sigil: Irreplaceable Memories
New Avatars: Tidesong Once More, Chuluu!
New Titles: Supernova Launcher, Fantasy Weaver
Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Flowers For You, Radiate into the Depths
Motorbike Accessory: Hiyuki Cube
 
[Anniversary Events]
[Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season]
[Star Bouncing] Anniversary Event
[Cubie Derby: Championship] Anniversary Event
[Lollo Express: Promise Delivered] Anniversary Featured Commission Event
[Gifts of Grand Celebration] Anniversary Limited-Time Login Event
[Bountiful Waves] Anniversary Points Exchange Event
 
[Anniversary Web Events]
[Into the Memory Program!] Web Event
[Back to Solaris] Web Event
 
[Collab Events]
Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1
Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2
 
[Special Events]
[Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy]
[Dimmr Traces] Area Exploration Event
[Dimmr Travelogue] Photo Collection Event
[Aced! Combat Mastery Test!] Featured Combat Event
[Beyond the Waves: Roya Frostlands] Featured Exploration Event
[Gifts of Starlight] 7-Day Login Event
 
[New Permanent Event]
Into the Land of Paradox
 
※For more details on the new content, optimizations, and bug fixes coming to the game in Version 3.3, please stay tuned for the upcoming release notes.
 
--------------------------------------------------------------------
 
[Device Requirements]
To ensure a smooth experience, please refer to the following requirements:
 
①Minimum
Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more
iOS: [System] iOS 14 or later; [Model] iPhone 11 or newer, iPad with A13 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more
Mac: [System] macOS 12.0 or later; [Model] m1 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more
PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700; [GPU] Geforce 1060/RX570/Intel ARC A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more
 
②Recommended
Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 8 Gen1+/Gen2/Gen3 or MediaTek processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more
iOS: [System] iOS 15 or later; [Model] iPhone 13 or newer, iPad with A15 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more
Mac: [System] macOS 15.0 or later; [Model] m3 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more
PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [GPU] Geforce 2060/RX5700XT/Intel ARC A750; [RAM] 16 GB or more
 
③Required Storage Space
Android/iOS: 45 GB
Mac: 130 GB
PC: 130 GB; it's recommended to install the game on an SSD.
PS5™: Please make sure your device has sufficient available storage to complete the update successfully.
 
④Controller Support
Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mobile.
Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™
Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mac.
Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™
Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on PC.
Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™
Wired Controllers: DualShock®4
※When you connect any other controller that supports multiple input modes to a PC, it is recommended that you set the controller to XInput mode for the best experience.
articleTitle: Wuthering Waves Version 3.3 Update Maintenance Notice
